description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.10 Docker image with three stages: build, test, and deploy, and a global before_script that runs: go version; echo $CI_BUILD_REF; echo $CI_PROJECT_DIR; curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golang/dep/master/install.sh | sh; mkdir -p /go/src/gitlab.com/willmitchell; cp -rv /builds/willmitchell/secret_runner_aws /go/src/gitlab.com/willmitchell/; cd /go/src/gitlab.com/willmitchell/secret_runner_aws. In the build stage add a build job that executes: dep ensure and go build. In the test stage add a test job that executes: dep ensure and go test -v -cover ./.... In the deploy stage add a deploy job that creates the binaries directory (mkdir -p $CI_PROJECT_DIR/binaries), runs dep ensure, echoes building messages, and builds three binaries with: GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-X main.version=$(git describe --always)" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/binaries/secret_runner_aws_windows.exe; GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-X main.version=$(git describe --always)" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/binaries/secret_runner_aws_linux; GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-X main.version=$(git describe --always)" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/binaries/secret_runner_aws_mac, and publishes the three binaries as artifacts. No special rules or services are defined.
